context: Realistic: read replica in same AZ as primary provides no HA benefit, no independent backups

checklist.name: Catches same-AZ replica
checklist.description: Identifies that the read replica is in the same availability zone as the primary database instance, providing no high-availability benefit — if the AZ goes down, both primary and replica are lost

checklist.name: Catches missing replica backups
checklist.description: Identifies that the replica has backup_retention_period set to 0, meaning no independent point-in-time recovery capability
